calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Omar Amokrane Plaintiff/Respondent in pro per.
SAMAN MASOUDI and MOHSEN M. ANSARI for Defendant/Appellant in pro per on behalf of MOHSEN M. ANSARI D.M.D. & ASSOCIATES.

This matter having been assigned from the department of the Presiding Judge for Small Claims Appeal Trial de Novo.

All parties are present and sworn. The Court hears the testimony of both sides and receives the following exhibits:

Plaintiff/Respondent EXH 1 - (collectively marked) Services, invoices and letters

Defendant/Appellant EXH A - Ledger, EXH B - Letter, EXH C - Consent to Treatment

The matter is taken under submission. Judge: Charlene Padovani Kiesselbach, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Set For Trial On Aug-09-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 318

Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Continued To Aug-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
